Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}When I close my eyes...[n]I remember the last moment[n]I spent with him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The day he fell asleep...[n]We brought him back to our dorm,[n]fear beginning to well up within us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}And the next morning,[n]our fears became reality.[n]He was lost to us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}For some time after that, I fell into[n]depression, and began having the[n]same dream night after night...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}A dream where I run after him, calling[n]his name... but can never catch up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}When he was alive, I promised to protect[n]him, and I made that my reason for living.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}But now... that promise can never be fulfilled.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Then one day, my sadness suddenly[n]left me, as if a mysterious fog had lifted.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I stopped dreaming... and I[n]now no longer require sleep.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 53 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Can I really continue living like this...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Aigis, are you awake!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Aigis, come quick! We need you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}It's hard to describe. The lobby floor suddenly opened up, and...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Anyway, we need to hurry to the lounge![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Come to think of it, that[n]day I stopped dreaming...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}That must have been[n]when all this actually began.[n]{f 1 1}
